overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a character walking through a rainy, neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character crosses a street intersection and proceeds along a covered sidewalk lined with holographic advertisements, palm trees, and NPC pedestrians carrying illuminated umbrellas.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rainy futuristic city intersection at night. The camera follows the character across a yellow crosswalk, passing a traffic light and speed limit sign, before entering a covered sidewalk area lined with palm trees and neon-lit buildings.

segments.scene_description: Walking along the covered sidewalk beneath neon ceiling lights, the character encounters a distinctive NPC with white hair who turns and walks past. The environment features digital billboards on the walls and other pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas approach from the opposite direction.

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the covered walkway, passing by a bench area where NPCs are seated. Large holographic advertisements dominate the left side, including a prominent security-themed display. Various pedestrians with illuminated umbrellas in purple, white, and orange colors pass by as the character walks deeper into the neon-lit corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked city intersection into a densely packed, neon-lit pedestrian corridor. It begins by following the character across a yellow crosswalk past traffic signs, moving seamlessly from the open street into a covered sidewalk area lined with palm trees. As the character progresses beneath the glow of neon ceiling lights, the scene shifts to a crowded walkway where a white-haired NPC passes by and pedestrians with glowing umbrellas approach from the opposite direction. The environment then expands into a corridor dominated by large holographic security advertisements and seating areas, before finally pushing deeper into the vibrant district amidst a stream of pedestrians carrying purple, white, and orange illuminated umbrellas.
